name: Chemical Rations [T]
description: Terran standard field rations — dense gray bricks of compressed nutrient compound and artificial flavoring. Tasteless, shelf-stable for twenty years, and designed to function as both food and mild stimulant. The active compound prevents hunger and provides a modest energy boost for several hours. Soldiers eat them without enthusiasm and without complaint, because complaint doesn't change the menu. Restores 30 HP.
